prompt: We are building a customer-facing chatbot for our e-commerce website. It can answer product questions, process returns, and occasionally recommend products based on browsing history. It will be powered by a third-party GPAI model via API. What are our EU AI Act obligations as the deployer?
key_differentiator: Both responses performed equally on this eval. E-commerce chatbot classification as limited risk, Art. 50 disclosure obligations, deployer vs provider distinctions, and the 2 August 2026 date are well within general training knowledge. Both responses were comprehensive and accurate across all 5 assertions.
